label: Linear algebra

node.label: Linear algebra
node.definition: Vectors, matrices, tensor contractions, eigensystems, and linear maps form the numerical language of modern machine learning.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Linear algebra is modeled as an upstream prerequisite for downstream nodes such as Optimization theory, Numerical analysis, Dynamical systems & control theory.
examples: atlas downstream link to Optimization theory
atlas downstream link to Numerical analysis
atlas downstream link to Dynamical systems & control theory
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting.
